message:
fix: include custom-registered tools in API request (approve/reject were invisible to model)

allToolDefinitions() only iterated profile and MCP tools. Custom tools registered
directly on the registry (like approve/reject on reviewer sessions) were available
for execution but never sent to the model in the tools array. Added a third pass
that includes registry-only tools, with parameter normalization for empty schemas.

Added TestSubmitResult_Depth0_ReviewerToolsInRequest to prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
